title: Zumper Property Scraper
description: Scrape apartment and property listings from Zumper.com. Provide a Zumper URL to find rentals. Supports pagination, proxy configuration, and result limits.

url.title: Zumper URL
url.description: Full Zumper URL to scrape, e.g. https://www.zumper.com/apartments-for-rent/vancouver-bc.

results_wanted.title: Maximum results
results_wanted.description: Maximum number of property listings to collect.

max_pages.title: Maximum pages
max_pages.description: Maximum number of search result pages to visit.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify Proxy settings. Residential proxies recommended for Zumper.
